div.font: PF is not a machine, but some process that uses the Actyx SDK to receive all events emitted by a swarm run. Sets up a subscription receiving all the events of some protocol.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 468px; height: 1px; padding-top: 758px; margin-left: 341px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

div.font: PF forwards every event it receives to the monitor process. A callback function is passed when setting up the subscription. The callback
